Name: Receptionist
Description: Registers patients and manages patient check-in

Name: Laboratory Technician
Description: Collects specimens and records laboratory test results

Name: Triage Nurse
Description: Performs triage assessment and captures vital signs

Name: Nurse
Description: Provides nursing care and documents nursing observations

Name: Doctor
Description: Provides medical consultation diagnosis treatment and orders

Name: Clinical Officer
Description: Provides clinical assessment diagnosis treatment and follow-up care

Name: Midwife
Description: Provides maternity antenatal delivery and postnatal care

Name: Radiology Technician
Description: Performs imaging procedures and records imaging-related encounter information

Name: Counsellor
Description: Provides counselling services and documents counselling encounters

Name: Nutritionist
Description: Provides nutrition assessment counselling and follow-up care

Name: Social Worker
Description: Provides social support assessment and linkage to services

Name: Data Clerk
Description: Enters or updates clinical and administrative encounter data

Name: Ward Nurse
Description: Provides inpatient ward care and documents ward observations

Name: Admitting Officer
Description: Completes admission-related documentation and assigns admission details

Name: Discharging Officer
Description: Completes discharge-related documentation and discharge instructions

Name: Theatre Staff
Description: Documents procedures and care provided in theatre or operating room
